violations_detail.title: Complete .meta.json with proper module metadata
violations_detail.description: .meta.json contains placeholder values instead of actual module configuration

violations_detail.title: Document dependency scanning for compile module tools
violations_detail.description: Tool YAML files reference external repositories without security audit trail or vulnerability scanning

violations_detail.title: Document MCP integration patterns for compile module
violations_detail.description: No MCP integration or containerization patterns documented

violations_detail.title: Document agent skills and hooks for compile module
violations_detail.description: No agent skills or orchestration patterns documented

violations_detail.title: Document memory channel strategy for compile module
violations_detail.description: No memory storage or channel routing logic documented

recommendations.details: Replace TODO placeholders with actual module configuration: describe purpose in category field, calculate lines of code, specify templates, health checks, and update URLs

recommendations.action: Add security audit trail for tool dependencies
recommendations.details: Create documentation for vulnerability scanning workflow, license compliance, and supply chain security verification for all referenced tools in YAML files
If module supports container execution, document MCP integration patterns, transport mechanisms (HTTP/stdio), and path translation strategies
Document skills, hooks, and orchestration patterns if compile module is intended to support multi-agent execution
Document memory storage strategy and channel routing if module generates persistent compilation artifacts or knowledge

compliance_status.notes: Module contains essential tool references but lacks required documentation across multiple ADRs. High-priority items address metadata completeness and security scanning documentation.
